name: text-channels
author: UnCorded
description: Text channels with real-time messaging, edits, and deletions.

channels.description: All text channels in this server.

messages.description: All messages across all channels. Replies have a non-null parent_message_id; roots aggregate reply_count and last_reply_at. The attachments column carries a JSON array of file records (filename + metadata only — signed URLs are minted fresh per read).

settings.label: Max message length
settings.description: Maximum characters allowed per message. Edits also enforce this. "Not Guarded" disables the cap entirely.

settings.label: Allow edits
settings.description: When off, posted messages are immutable.

settings.label: Allow file attachments
settings.description: Master switch for the Attach button. When off, messages cannot carry files.

settings.label: Max file size
settings.description: Per-file upload limit. Runtime enforces 5 GB as a hard ceiling. Files over 50 MB are uploaded in resumable chunks.

settings.label: Attachments per message
settings.description: Maximum number of files allowed in a single message.
